title: Stargate on Track for 9+ GW by 2029, Comparable to NYC Peak Demand
summary: Epoch AI Research surveyed all 7 US Stargate sites and concluded the project appears on track for 9+ GW by 2029, comparable to New York City peak demand. Today's annual global datacenter capex is roughly 5–7 Manhattan Projects per year in inflation-adjusted terms.

title: [PDF] National Policy Framework for Artificial Intelligence - The White House
summary: • Congress should ensure that it does not preempt states from enforcing their own generally applicable laws protecting children, such as prohibitions on child sexual abuse material, even where such material is generated by AI. • Congress should consider establishing a federal framework protecting individuals from the unauthorized distribution or commercial use of AI-generated digital replicas of their voice, likeness, or other identifiable attributes, while providing clear exceptions for parody, satire, news reporting, and other expressive works protected by the First Amendment. • Congress should preempt state AI laws that impose undue burdens to ensure a minimally burdensome national standard consistent with these recommendations, not fifty discordant ones. • This national standard should respect key principles of federalism and not preempt: o The traditional police powers retained by the states to enforce laws of general applicability against AI developers and users, including particular laws to protect children, prevent fraud, and protect consumers.

title: 特朗普政府推出全国性AI政策框架 拟统一监管并限制各州立法权
summary: 财联社3月21日讯（编辑 牛占林）特朗普政府周五发布了一项人工智能(AI)立法框架，旨在建立统一的国家级政策体系，为这一新兴技术设定一致的安全与监管标准，同时限制各州自行制定AI法规的权力。这份包含六大支柱的纲要性文件提出了一系列针对AI产品和基础设施的监管措施，包括引入新的儿童安全规则，以及对AI数据中心的审批...

title: AI Governance Watch: Nineteen New AI Bills Passed Into ...
summary: *   [SB 11](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-co-2026a-sb11/2968731)– Relates to search warrants provided to covered platforms including social media companies and AI platforms. *   [S 1297](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-id-2026-s1297/2953077)– Establishes regulations for conversational AI services. *   [SB 256](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-ut-2026-sb256/2945650)– Amends defamation and personal identity protection laws to address artificial intelligence (AI) and digitally manipulated content. *   [SB 267](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-ut-2026-sb267/2946736)– This bill requires the Utah State Board of Education (state board) to study best practices for software use in public schools including as it relates to data privacy and AI. *   [SB 319](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-ut-2026-sb319/2944941)– This bill amends Utah’s health insurance preauthorization laws (Section 31A-22-650) with several significant changes including increased disclosure requirements for the use of AI by insurers. *   [HB 1170](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-wa-2025_2026-hb1170/2946953)– Requiring large AI providers (1M+ monthly users) and government agencies to inform users when content is modified using artificial intelligence. *   [SB 5105](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-wa-2025_2026-sb5105/2942418)– Expands and strengthens existing laws against sexually explicit depictions of minors, with a particular focus on AI-generated content. *   [SB 5395](https://pluralpolicy.com/app/legislative-tracking/bill/details/state-wa-2025_2026-sb5395/2942385)– Increases restrictions on the use of AI in prior authorizations by health insurance carriers.

title: 防止偏见歧视、算法压榨，重磅政策出台剑指AI科技伦理治理
summary: 21世纪经济报道记者 冉黎黎 今年政府工作报告首次提出“打造智能经济新形态”，并强调“完善人工智能治理”。 人工智能科技伦理治理是人工智能治理的重要组成部分。近日，工业和信息化部等十部门联合印发《人工智能科技伦理审查与服务办法（试行）》（以下简称《办法》），为我国人工智能科技伦理审查与服务工作提供了明确...

title: 南非发布AI政策草案 拟推多监管治理模式
summary: 中新社约翰内斯堡4月11日电(记者 孙翔)南非10日公布国家人工智能(AI)政策草案，将采取“分领域、多监管机构”的治理模式。 该草案由南非通信与数字技术部发布，旨在完善监管体系、促进技术创新，推动本国人工智能生态系统发展，同时应对相关的伦理、社会和经济挑战。草案基于2024年发布的国家人工智能政策框架制定，并吸收...

title: Microsoft invests $5.5 billion in Singapore AI
summary: Microsoft is investing $5.5 billion in Singapore for regional AI infrastructure, setting a new record for the company in Asia-Pacific. Students will receive free Copilot subscriptions to assist with digital transformation in education.
